creator: rone@ennui.org
text:
I tried to rip some CDs with dagrab and failed, so i tried tosha, which
gave me a more verbose error message:

xptioctl: pass driver is not in the kernel
xptioctl: put "device pass0" in your kernel config file

It would be nice if LINT threw in a comment near "device pass" indicating
that it's necessary for CD ripping.

Fix: 

Add comment to LINT.
